generation_rule: Enumerate candidate_index from zero. For each upper-triangle J edge and each h coordinate, SHA-256 the public seed plus the coordinate label, map the first eight big-endian digest bytes modulo the frozen coefficient list, mirror J, and keep its diagonal zero. Skip only complete J,h pair identity collisions with the 51-case development corpus or within this new batch. Stop at 64 without waveform execution or oracle inspection.
